title: Realtime Chat App with User Avatars and Chat Filtering

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Realtime Chat App with User Avatars and Chat Filtering

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <rect x='50' y='50' width='300' height='40' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <rect x='50' y='120' width='300' height='150' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <rect x='350' y='120' width='40' height='40' rx='10' fill='#411C56'/>
  <text x='20' y='40' font-size='24' fill='#000'>Channels</text>
  <text x='20' y='140' font-size='24' fill='#000'>Messages</text>
  <text x='350' y='140' font-size='24' fill='#FFF'>Search</text>
  <path d='M 160 220 L 220 220' stroke='#000' strokeWidth='2'/>
  <path d='M 220 220 L 220 260' stroke='#000' strokeWidth='2'/>
  <path d='M 220 260 L 240 260' stroke='#000' strokeWidth='2'/>
  <path d='M 240 260 L 240 280' stroke='#000' strokeWidth='2'/>
  <path d='M 240 280 L 220 280' stroke='#000' strokeWidth='2'/>
  <path d='M 220 280 L 220 220' stroke='#000' strokeWidth='2'/>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Must display user avatars and chat filtering functionality

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Realtime Chat App with User Avatars and Chat Filtering

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, channel selection, search functionality, and message sending.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
